Logs Directory: /tmp/inspectra-clifx-msexce-47915de5-d5274a0a/tool/.store/msexceldiff/0.4.4/msexceldiff/0.4.4/tools/net10.0/any/logs
MsExcelDiff v0.4.4

USAGE
  diffexcel <path1> <path2> [options]
  diffexcel [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Compare two Excel workbooks using Microsoft Spreadsheet Compare

PARAMETERS
* path1             Path to the first Excel workbook 
* path2             Path to the second Excel workbook 

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  set-path          Set the path to SPREADSHEETCOMPARE.EXE. Settings are saved in the user configuration file. 
  settings          Display the settings 

You can run `diffexcel [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

USAGE
  diffexcel set-path <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Set the path to SPREADSHEETCOMPARE.EXE. Settings are saved in the user configuration file.

PARAMETERS
* value             Path to SPREADSHEETCOMPARE.EXE, or empty to clear and revert to auto-detection 

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
